item.title: French contractor appoints Subsea7 veteran as new chief executive
item.description: Olivier Blaringhem set to lead Bourbon starting in September

item.title: Global LNG tightness could trigger unprecedented demand destruction
item.description: Asia now outbidding Europe for LNG cargoes in name of security of supply but painful demand destruction rebalancing set to hit both markets

item.title: ‘Supply chains are under strain’: How Trafigura’s agile tanker fleet turned chaos into profit
item.description: Swiss trader says it has the capacity to react swiftly to market disruption

item.title: Galp makes exploration move in Equatorial Guinea
item.description: Portuguese player signs tentative deal to study three blocks

item.title: Eni snaps up huge reconnaissance licence in undrilled African frontier
item.description: Italian major secures rights to study 50,000 square kilometre tract in Guinea-Conakry

item.title: Alberta lands oil export deal with Ottawa, then flirts with separatism
item.description: Icy relations between province and federal government may be thawing, but independence movement could spoil the mood

item.title: Russia allows TotalEnergies to exit sanctioned LNG project
item.description: French supermajor given green light to offload its 10% stake in Arctic LNG 2 to Russian company

item.title: Industry gears up for contentious Alaska lease sale
item.description: US Bureau of Land Management pledges to open more of Alaska and beyond to drilling amid record leasing activity

item.title: Transocean semisub snapped up for exploration Down Under
item.description: Santos and Carnarvon planning 2027 Bedout sub-basin campaign, with drilling targets including untested plays

item.title: Asia-focused indie hunting for a new CEO
item.description: Miltos Xynogalas stepping back from the helm of Conrad Asia Energy

item.title: Asia-focused indie hunting for new CEO
item.description: Miltos Xynogalas stepping back from helm of Conrad Asia Energy

item.title: Contractors eye options to help unlock future LNG projects
item.description: Contractors discuss future of LNG contract and execution models during Samsung E&A Tech Forum 2026

item.title: Cambodia moves offshore dispute with Thailand to the UN
item.description: Phnom Penh government keen to unlock oil and gas resources in Overlapping Claims Area

item.title: Approvals imminent for Timor-Leste offshore development
item.description: ‘Expedited’ review has commenced for Finder Energy’s field development plan

item.title: Shell potentially selling off stake in Australian carbon credits developer
item.description: Supermajor exploring options to divest stake, according to reports

item.title: Three-horse race for Indonesia platform prize
item.description: Prima Energy finally advancing Ande Ande Lumut heavy oil development

item.title: MISC and K Line score second newbuild for Northern Lights CCS
item.description: Chinese yard to deliver LCO2 carrier for Equinor-led open-access carbon capture and storage scheme

item.title: Vantris Energy receives clean audit opinion for first time in four years
item.description: EY finds no material uncertainty related to going concern

item.title: Floating LNG player confirms $5 billion green light for US Gulf project
item.description: Delfin Midstream reaches FID on first of three planned liquefaction vessels

item.title: US security agencies warn of cyberattacks on oil field equipment
item.description: Companies are being urged to consider taking their automatic tank gauge systems offline to prevent sabotage

item.title: US security agencies warn of cyberattacks on oilfield equipment
item.description: Companies urged to consider taking automatic tank gauge systems offline to prevent sabotage

item.title: Kazakh oilfield hits milestone with start-up of gas reinjection facility
item.description: Facility's long-awaited compressor will boost gas reinjection to allow higher oil production

item.title: UK North Sea industry in dark amid potential threat escalation
item.description: Industry says offshore platforms should be designated as critical national infrastructure

item.title: ExxonMobil to contract installation services for Guyana FPSO
item.description: Hammerhead field in Stabroek block is expected to start production in 2029

item.title: Adnoc selects contractors for $10 billion-plus giant offshore expansion
item.description: New expansion phase at Upper Zakum aims to increase field’s oil production capacity to up to 1.5 million barrels per day

item.title: Equinor tunes up Bay du Nord hunt for rock installation vessels
item.description: Chosen fallpipe vessel will have to place almost 330,000 tonnes of rock in 1200 metres of water

item.title: Chevron submits $13.8 billion plan for Argentina shale project
item.description: El Trapial block in Neuquen basin is company's crown jewel in Vaca Muerta

item.title: Frontier basin blocks offered in latest east Canada bid round
item.description: Acreage includes ultra-deepwater blocks in undrilled Salar basin

item.title: Clarity emerges on Hercules contract in Canada
item.description: Warm-stacked semisub will work on Suncor's Terra Nova field in Newfoundland & Labrador

item.title: Oslo based driller lands binding deal for semisub
item.description: Dolphin Drilling has secured long-term work for last of its three semisubs
